extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL Mathieu attacked final kilometer of Mûr-de-Bretagne, took stage win plus yellow jersey with combined time bonuses from both ascents
tactical_patterns: INEOS prioritizing bonus seconds theft over stage wins to defend GC, using CARAPAZ Richard for sprint finishes.
VAN DER POEL Mathieu attacked at 500m remaining, not summit, exploiting explosive power when pure climbers already committed.
QUINTANA Nairo launched too early at 1km out, allowing lighter riders to counter after his acceleration faded.
THOMAS Geraint lost 20+ seconds on short explosive finish, revealing vulnerability on steep punchy gradients despite GC ambitions.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: Combined two climb bonuses with late-attack timing to take yellow, showing tactical maturity beyond pure power
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Covered QUINTANA attack then finished second for bonuses, positioning himself while rivals struggled
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Lost 20+ seconds on short punchy finish, exposing weakness on explosive climbs that threatens GC viability
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: Attack at 1km proved premature as finish required shorter explosive effort, not sustained climbing
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: Moved up aggressively on steep finish despite sprinter profile, suggesting form for hilly bunch finishes
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Struggled badly on final meters despite yellow jersey, indicating yesterday's crash or effort took toll
